title: mesosphaerum asperifolium
intro: Mesosphaerum asperifolium, also known as the rough-leaved hyptis, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with Mesosphaerum asperifolium include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Mesosphaerum asperifolium can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
